papers_mined.title: Gadaa Oromo democratic system (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Oromo Gada democratic system; 5 generation classes rotate political/economic/ritual responsibilities every 8 years; 11 grades; consensus selection of 9 Salgan ya'ii Borana leaders.

papers_mined.title: Gada Britannica
papers_mined.note: Genealogical-descent (not age) class membership; 40-year cycle; principle of balanced opposition between parties + power-sharing across levels.

papers_mined.title: Gadaa System East Shewa Oromo
papers_mined.note: Detailed grade progression dabalee→rogge→follee→qondaala→dorri; 8-year terms; consensus 9 leaders; rotating responsibilities.

papers_mined.title: Oromo Gadaa Accountability Values
papers_mined.note: Three principles: 8-year terms + balanced opposition + power-sharing across levels.

papers_mined.note: LLM-side: orchestrated teams of specialized agents replacing single all-purpose; role-specialization at prompt/tool/backbone levels.

papers_mined.title: Multi-Agent LLM Systems Preprint 2025-11
